sourcesContent: /** * Review Step * * Final review of all policy configuration before submission. * Allows users to navigate back to specific steps to make edits. */ import React from 'react'; import { Box, Typography, Card, CardContent, Button, Chip, Divider, Grid, List, ListItem, ListItemText, Alert, } from '@mui/material'; import EditIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Edit'; import CheckCircleIcon from '@mui/icons-material/CheckCircle'; import SecurityIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Security'; import TimerIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Timer'; import VerifiedIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Verified'; const ReviewStep = ({ policyConfig, trustProfile, template, onEdit }) => { // Helper to format seconds to human-readable const formatDuration = (seconds) => { const days = Math.floor(seconds / 86400); const hours = Math.floor((seconds % 86400) / 3600); const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60); if (days > 0) return `${days} day${days > 1 ? 's' : ''}`; if (hours > 0) return `${hours} hour${hours > 1 ? 's' : ''}`; return `${minutes} minute${minutes > 1 ? 's' : ''}`; }; const holderBindingLabels = { device_key: 'Device Key', session_nonce: 'Session Nonce', biometric: 'Biometric', none: 'None', }; return ( Review & Submit Review all configuration details before creating the policy. You can edit any section by clicking the "Edit" button on that card. {/* Basic Information */} Basic Information Policy Name {policyConfig.name || Not set} Description {policyConfig.description || Not set} Purpose Statement {policyConfig.purpose || Not set} {/* Trust Profile */} Trust Profile {trustProfile ? ( {trustProfile.name} {trustProfile.is_default && ( )} ) : ( No trust profile selected )} {/* Template */} {template && ( Template {template.icon} {template.name} {template.standardReference && ( )} )} {/* Credential Types & Claims */} Credential Types & Claims Accepted Credential Types {policyConfig.accepted_credential_types.length > 0 ? ( policyConfig.accepted_credential_types.map((type) => ( )) ) : ( None specified )} Required Claims ({policyConfig.required_claims.length}) {policyConfig.required_claims.map((claim, index) => ( {claim.claim_name} {claim.accept_predicate && ( )} } secondary={`From: ${claim.credential_type}`} /> ))} {policyConfig.required_claims.length === 0 && ( No claims specified )} {policyConfig.prefer_predicates && ( )} {policyConfig.single_presentation && ( )} {/* Freshness & Binding */} Freshness & Security Holder Binding {holderBindingLabels[policyConfig.holder_binding] || policyConfig.holder_binding} Revocation Check {policyConfig.freshness_requirements.require_revocation_check ? ( ) : ( )} Max Credential Age {formatDuration(policyConfig.freshness_requirements.max_credential_age_seconds)} Max Proof Age {formatDuration(policyConfig.freshness_requirements.max_proof_age_seconds)} {/* Standard Reference */} {policyConfig.metadata?.standard_reference && ( Compliance Standard {policyConfig.metadata.standard_reference} )} ); }; export default ReviewStep;
